text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, look! Am I killing it today or what?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I had the day off, so I went to a spa, and it was iiiincredible!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: There were flower petals, like, floating in the water, and the beauty treatments were high-key amazing!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I can't recommend it enough! You should totally
check it out! Wanna take the day off today and
head over?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Tosen Jordan made great use of her time
off and got plenty of rest!
